purpose: Promote the prediction-market research lane from a generic checkpoint game into a lane-specific data-only replay module with its own generated observatory texture, responsive board, and settlement-focused station model.

queries: prediction market dashboard settlement rules UI event timeline resolution source clock
prediction market trading interface resolution rules source of truth dashboard
event replay timeline UI financial markets settlement risk dashboard
prediction market resolution rules source of truth settlement event dashboard
Kalshi market settlement rules source of truth documentation
Polymarket market resolution rules source source of truth documentation
design_takeaways: Resolution source, rules, eligibility, settlement timing, and finality risk should be visible objects rather than hidden notes.
The module should emphasize archived packet replay and source-clock checks instead of trade execution.
No-trade, account, credential, deposit, withdrawal, KYC, and real-money boundaries should appear as sealed gates.

image_generation.prompt_summary: Premium dark futuristic market observatory, circular replay chamber, event timeline arcs, settlement clocks, rules tablets, dispute locks, data packet tiles, sealed treasury/no-trade vault, violet and teal lighting, no text, no people, no logos.

frontend_features: Added settlement-replay dispatch and step-count support.
Added five data-derived settlement stations: Packet Archive, Paper Replay, Rules Clock, Venue Friction, and No-Trade Vault.
Added a lane-specific board with orbit rings, diamond nodes, clock sweep, meter cards, sealed warning states, and responsive desktop/mobile layouts.
Added versioned cache keys and README documentation for standalone reuse.
safety_boundaries: The module reads local trail/snapshot data only.
It does not connect to venues, accounts, credentials, trading APIs, deposits, withdrawals, KYC flows, orders, or real-money trading.
The no-trade station visualizes those boundaries as sealed.
